news.t: Corgi Lists Founder-Led 2x Daily ETF (FDRX) on Nasdaq

overview.description: The Founder-Led 2X Daily ETF (FDRX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Founder Led index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to an index of the top 50 largest, publicly traded US stocks where at least one original founder serves in the C-suite or equivalent role. The portfolio is market-cap weighted. FDRX was launched on Nov 25, 2025 and is issued by Founder.

data.title: Corgi Lists Founder-Led 2x Daily ETF (FDRX) on Nasdaq
data.text: Corgi lists its Founder-Led 2x Daily ETF on Nasdaq to provide diversified, rules-based founder-led exposure.
